name: Resonant Binding With Default Right Associative
description: u8:value >>- Change -> 0 — both >>- and -> are at ASSIGNMENT precedence which is right-associative. The parser binds the trailing 'Change -> 0' as a single Pointing, then makes it the to-side of the ResonancePush. This pins the current behavior; the README's resonance form does not specify how a trailing default attaches.
